Startup insights

Value proposition

Flibbo is your AI-powered assistant for posts, visuals, and original music.

Problem solved

Effortlessly create viral content with AI-generated post ideas, realistic visuals, and original music.

Pricing

Free · In-App Purchases

Target audience

Content creators, influencers, and businesses

Business details

B2C ~10,000 users
Mobile Apps AI

Flibbo is an all in one AI creation platform with image, video, music, prompts, tutorials, and a social feed.
